channel.title: Telegram Client on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Telegram Client on Tech Tracker

item.title: iMe Messenger - best telegram client with amazing crypto wallet.
item.description: **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-5GPdPEi8cE8/YKKH2u70CpI/AAAAAAAAEls/oqkDRF9q5m4XUeqMeowGsLBrsChCIlCWwCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1621264343414047-0.png" alt="iMe Messenger - Best Telegram Client With Crypto Wallet For Android & iOS" title="iMe Messenger - Best Telegram Client With Crypto Wallet For Android &amp; iOS"> ** Telegram is one of the popular messaging app competing whatsapp and signal but it does lack some features which are needed by certain percentage of users due to that people who are requiring certain features were not able to get them on telegram in time due to late updates but eventhough it take sometime to get users feedbacks and user requests based features on telegram they will definately come in future.
